programme.title: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
programme.desc: (M) Meet Stephanie. Online, she's building a brand as a bespoke makeup and SFX artist. But offline, her life becomes complicated and spirals into mystery.

programme.title: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: (MA) A new ACM begins a relationship with 14-year-old decoy Mackenzie. A man in another state reaches out to Abby looking to meet up with her and her friends.

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories: The Investigators
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
